\section{Conclusion}
\label{sec:conclusion}
In this work, we introduced \ourmethod{} and \ourdataset{} to transform unstructured, preliminary AI research materials into submission-ready manuscripts. Experiments demonstrate that our multi-agent framework can generate high-quality research papers with competitive runtime (App.~\ref{appendix:cost}) while synthesizing deep, context-aware literature reviews. Future research can focus on expanding the framework's capacity to ingest richer research artifacts and transitioning these autonomous agents into interactive, dynamic writing environments to enable seamless human-AI scientific collaboration (more limitations discussed in App.~\ref{appendix:limitations}).
